claimElements.evidence: Tool resources, registration records, lineage nodes, audit records, lifecycle transitions, and capability advertisements are all schema-valid; see examples/adaptations/northstar-tool-registry/manifest.json

14 of 15 bundle artifacts are JSON-Schema-validated against the six baseline schemas (resource-entity, registration-record, lineage-node, audit-record, lifecycle-transition, capability-advertisement); the 15th is prose-validated per the evidence-attestation contract

v1 to v2 lineage chain, audit records at each create/update/transition step, lifecycle transition draft to active. See docs/adaptations/northstar-tool-registry.md and tools/adaptations/replay-northstar.py for the lifecycle replay proof.
RegisterResourceVersion and TransitionLifecycleState envelopes are JSON-on-the-wire shapes that compose with HTTP, gRPC, message-queue, or any other binding without affecting AGRP-side semantics
